race.comment: BOLO MISS (2) two runs back have been full of merit and a win looks imminent. Closed strongly from off the speed with a game second over 1000m at this track. Tongue-tie goes on and no shock to see her finish over the top of these. LA POTENZA (6) nice filly heading in the right direction but doesn't get the same map favours. Sent to the front with a dominant on-pace win over 1300m at this track in good style. Sure to be thereabouts is she can get cover early. DENMAN BANDIT (4) resumed for his second prep with a fast finishing fourth over 1000m at this track. Has further upside and sure to be thereabouts. ZAIBATSU (14) significant weight drop for this after savaging the line late with a narrow second over 1000m at Orange. Ugly map but stays in the calculations.
